---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / use case**
What are you trying to do? What problem would this solve?

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you would like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Target platform**
macOS / Windows / Linux / Android / iOS / any.

**Printing context (if relevant)**
Paper size, printer, borderless vs. bordered, DPI, etc.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, references, examples.
